message:
feat(cli): add rich terminal table, shorthand resume flags, and workspace-scoped list default

Three UX improvements to the session resumer CLI:

1. Rich terminal table for list output: Replace plain-text session
   listing with a styled, column-aligned table via rich_rust crate,
   including rank, provider, session ID, messages, started time
   (formatted in local timezone), and title columns

2. Shorthand resume flags (-cc, -cod, -gmi): New argument rewriting
   layer in rewrite_shorthand_resume_args() that translates ergonomic
   shorthand flags into canonical resume <target> <session-id> commands

3. Default workspace scoping: The list command now defaults to the
   current working directory as workspace filter instead of showing all
   workspaces, and reduces default --limit from 50 to 10

All three features covered by new and updated E2E tests including
shorthand flag parsing (cc, cod, gmi) and workspace default behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
